carry_and_align_silver_mold_on_press_tab.query: a worker carries a two-level silver mold with both hands onto the press table, pushes it under the cylindrical upper press tool, aligns its position, and supports it with the left hand

operate_blue_lower_control_lever.query: the worker reaches below the main control panel to the small blue lower lever, grips and moves that blue lever, then releases it; exclude touching the silver mold or the upper panel buttons
